title: CORRECTING and REPLACING General Mills to Webcast Remarks at Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference on September 6, 2022
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First paragraph of release dated August 23, 2022 should read: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Jeff Harmening will be speaking at the Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference on Tuesday, September 6, 2022 from 11:00 - 11:40am CT (instead of 12:00 - 12:40pm CT). The updated release reads: GENERAL MILLS TO WEBCAST REMARKS AT BARCLAYS GLOBAL CONSUMER STAPLES CONFERENCE ON SEPTEMBER 6, 2022 General Mills, Inc. title: 7 Consumer Stocks to Buy and Hold for Years
text: While concerns like inflation, interest rates, and a possible recession continue to challenge stocks, that doesn't mean you should be sitting on the sidelines. Rather, you should be still active in the markets, focusing on high quality, resilient names, that can ride out any additional uncertainty that may arise.

title: General Mills' Monster Cereals Return in KAWS-Designed Boxes
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--General Mills' beloved Franken Berry, Count Chocula, Boo-Berry and – for the first time in nearly a decade – Frute Brute Monster Cereals are back with the limited-edition release of four KAWS-designed boxes. Inspired by classic horror film characters, the Monster Cereals have been fan favorites for more than half a century and this year renowned American artist and Monster enthusiast KAWS was inspired by the vintage styling of the original boxes.
